message:
feat(core/cli): extend simulation framework with font-size, scrollback, and metadata support (wa-1u90p.1.1)

Enhances the simulation scenario framework and CLI to support the full
range of resize baseline stress testing needed by the Zero-Hitch Resize
epic. Also applies formatting cleanup from cargo fmt.

simulation.rs changes:
- Reformatted reproducibility_key() and parse_scrollback_spec() per
  cargo fmt (no logic change)
- Added tests: to_mock_event_set_font_size_marker validates SetFontSize
  action produces [FONT_SIZE:X.XX] marker output
- Added tests: to_mock_event_generate_scrollback validates scrollback
  generation with correct line count and width
- Added tests: parse_metadata_and_reproducibility_key validates full
  reproducibility key composition (suite:version:name:seed)
- Added tests: metadata_empty_values_are_rejected validates validation
  rejects empty metadata strings
- Added tests: generate_scrollback_validation_rejects_bad_specs validates
  zero-line scrollback is rejected
- Extended pane_default_values test to verify window_id, tab_id, and
  metadata defaults

main.rs changes:
- Doc comment rebrand (terminal hypervisor → swarm-native terminal platform)
- ft simulate inspect: now shows metadata and reproducibility_key in both
  JSON and human-readable output
- ft simulate list: shows 4 built-in resize_baseline scenarios with paths
  instead of "(none yet)" placeholder
- ft simulate list: YAML format example updated with metadata, window_id,
  tab_id, set_font_size, generate_scrollback actions, and updated
  expectation format
- ft simulate validate: shows metadata and reproducibility_key
- ft simulate run event display: handles SetFontSize and
  GenerateScrollback action variants
- Default description updated: "swarm-native terminal platform for AI
  agent fleets"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
